column1: ここで写真を撮っ___ですか。（許可）
column5: てもいい: permission granted — you may do X; it is okay to do X
column8: module:01-n5 jlpt:n5 point:いい complexity:standard confusable-with:てはいけない source:shin-kanzen scaffold:pending-audio frequency:top10k

column1: ここで写真を撮っ___。（禁止）
column5: てはいけない: prohibition — you must not do X; it is not okay
column8: module:01-n5 jlpt:n5 point:いい complexity:standard confusable-with:てもいい source:shin-kanzen scaffold:pending-audio frequency:top10k

column5: なくてもいい: no need to — even without doing X it is fine; releases obligation
column8: module:01-n5 jlpt:n5 point:いい complexity:standard confusable-with:なければいけない source:shin-kanzen scaffold:pending-audio frequency:top10k

column5: なければいけない: must do — obligation; contrast with なくてもいい (not required)
column8: module:01-n5 jlpt:n5 point:いい complexity:standard confusable-with:なくてもいい source:shin-kanzen scaffold:pending-audio frequency:top10k confusable-with:しなくてもいい

column1: 早く来てくれれば___のに。（残念）
column5: よかった: past-tense いい — expressing regret that X didn't happen
column8: module:01-n5 jlpt:n5 point:いい complexity:standard confusable-with:いい source:shin-kanzen scaffold:pending-audio frequency:top10k

column1: もう帰っ___よ。（許可の口語）
column5: ていいよ: casual permission — contractions of てもいい to ていい in speech
column8: module:01-n5 jlpt:n5 point:いい complexity:standard confusable-with:てはいけない source:shin-kanzen scaffold:pending-audio frequency:top10k confusable-with:てはいけないよ
